title: Executive Order 9432—Designation of Under Secretary and Assistant Secretaries of the Interior to Act as Secretary of the Interior

flags.justification: A routine, internal line-of-succession designation under existing statutory authority.
A clear, specific, ordered succession chain.
An internal administrative designation creating no compliance regime.
No compliance regime exists for an incentive structure to attach to.
A standing internal succession designation, evergreen by nature.
No existing oversight mechanism is removed.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A routine internal administrative housekeeping action.
No second agency or mandate is implicated.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.

notes: Validation batch (negative). Structural weight: 0/10 = 0.0%. Cleanly supersedes a prior order (EO 7277) rather than layering ambiguously on top of it.
